11 Reasons: Tucson living up to title of UNESCO City Of Gastronomy

TUCSON (KVOA) — It is an incredible honor to be selected to be a UNESCO City Of Gastronomy. Tucson was selected in 2015 and is part of an elite group of cities from around the world recognized for their unique food and cultural ties to their communities. The recognition is well earned as the…
